name: JoAi: Update Stats

description.en: View summary counts for your team updates, including deals, events, and news-style posts. Use this to understand how much active customer-facing content is available across connected websites and public feeds.
description.de: Zeige zusammengefasste Zahlen für Team-Updates, inklusive Angeboten, Events und News. So siehst du, wie viele kundenrelevante Inhalte auf verbundenen Websites und öffentlichen Feeds verfügbar sind.

bot: Use this when the user asks how many updates, deals, events, or news posts the team has.
